title: onobrychis fallax
intro: Onobrychis fallax, also known as the less common Persian clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Onobrychis fallax include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and have antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
